headline: Avery Dennison (AVY): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, Avery Dennison’s shares (currently trading at $163.83) have posted a disappointing 10.1% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 11.4% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
